name: Bodybuilder
description: The ultimate challenge! A muscular bodybuilder in a Front Double Bicep pose with custom pieces. 50 layers of pure gains. Good luck!

steps.description: Build the stage platform — dark grey base
Place both feet on the platform
Lower quads — quad sweep highlight and inner shadow
Lower abs — first row of six-pack
Lower pec shelf with under-pec shadow line
Mid pecs — nipple detail and chest groove
Upper pecs with shoulder transition curves
Shoulder deltoid domes on both sides
Left elbow bend and BICEP PEAK!
Right elbow bend and BICEP PEAK!
Left fist — clenched with nail detail
Right fist — clenched with nail detail
Eyes — blue iris with brow shadow
